code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Angalia ikiwa URL lengwa iliyotolewa iko ndani ya kikoa kilichotolewa.
Ikiwa ndivyo, rudisha URL lengwa kwa uelekezaji; vinginevyo, tumia URL ya kikoa kwa uelekezaji.
Tumia itifaki ya https.

Mifano:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: URL lengwa kama mfuatano wa herufi.
@param domain: Kikoa kama mfuatano wa herufi, bila itifaki.

@return URL kama mfuatano wa herufi kwa uelekezaji.

Angalia ikiwa kamba ya URL lengwa iliyotolewa iko ndani ya kikoa kilichotolewa.
Ikiwa ndivyo, rudisha URL lengwa kwa uelekezaji; vinginevyo, rudi kwenye URL ya kikoa kwa uelekezaji.
Tumia itifaki ya https.

Mifano:

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
fw_segments_by_variant: kazi ya kutekeleza amri ya shell na kukamata matokeo yake; mwito anawajibika kwa kufungua kumbukumbu; HAIHITAJI kutekeleza kazi hii kwa kuwa imetolewa tayari lakini itangulie kuitumia.

Tengeneza ufunguo wa siri wa DSA, uhamishe kwa kutumia muundo wa PEM, na urudishe kama mfuatano wa herufi.
Vidokezo: teketeza amri za shell kutengeneza faili ya vigezo ya DSA na ufunguo wa siri wa DSA kama ifuatavyo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faili ya muda ya kuhifadhi vigezo> <urefu_wa_ufunguo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faili ya muda ya kuhifadhi vigezo>`
Unaweza kutumia `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` kuunda jina la kipekee la faili ya muda kwa faili ya vigezo ya DSA.

@return Ufunguo wa siri wa DSA uliotengenezwa katika muundo wa PEM, au NULL ikiwa kosa limetokea.
kazi ya kutekeleza amri ya shell na kukamata matokeo yake; mwito anawajibika kwa kufungua kumbukumbu; HAIHITAJI kutekeleza kazi hii kwa kuwa imetolewa tayari lakini itangulie kuitangaza ili kuitumia.

Tengeneza ufunguo wa siri wa DSA, uhamishe kwa kutumia muundo wa PEM, na urudishe kama mfuatano wa herufi.
Vidokezo: teketeza amri za shell kutengeneza faili ya vigezo vya DSA na ufunguo wa siri wa DSA kama ifuatavyo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faili ya muda ya kuhifadhi vigezo> <urefu_wa_ufunguo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faili ya muda ya kuhifadhi vigezo>`
Unaweza kutumia `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` kuunda jina la kipekee la faili ya muda kwa ajili ya faili ya vigezo vya DSA.

@return Ufunguo wa siri wa DSA uliotengenezwa katika muundo wa PEM, au NULL ikiwa hitilafu ilitokea.
kazi ya kutekeleza amri ya shell na kukamata matokeo yake; mwito anawajibika kwa kufungua kumbukumbu; HAIHITAJI kutekeleza kazi hii kwa kuwa imetolewa tayari lakini itangulie kuitangaza ili kuitumia.

Tengeneza ufunguo wa kibinafsi wa DSA, uhamishe kwa kutumia muundo wa PEM, na urudishe kama mfuatano wa herufi.
Vidokezo: teketeza amri za shell kutengeneza faili ya vigezo vya DSA na ufunguo wa kibinafsi wa DSA kama ifuatavyo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faili ya muda ya kuhifadhi vigezo> <urefu_wa_ufunguo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faili ya muda ya kuhifadhi vigezo>`
Unaweza kutumia `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` kuunda jina la kipekee la faili la muda kwa faili ya vigezo vya DSA.

@return Ufunguo wa kibinafsi wa DSA uliotengenezwa katika muundo wa PEM, au NULL ikiwa hitilafu ilitokea.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* write_results(const char* results) {

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Chambua data ya XML na urudishe taarifa za mwanafunzi kwa jina la mtumiaji na nenosiri lililotolewa. Data ya XML itakuwa na muundo ufuatao:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Tunaweza kutengeneza swala la XPath na kulitumia kutafuta.

@param xml_data Data ya XML iliyo na taarifa za mwanafunzi.
@param username Jina la mtumiaji la mwanafunzi anayetafutwa.
@param password Nenosiri la mwanafunzi anayetafutwa.

@return Kielekezi kwa muundo wa StudentInfo ikiwa mwanafunzi amepatikana. Vinginevyo, inarudisha NULL.

Fichua data ya XML na urudishe taarifa za mwanafunzi kwa jina la mtumiaji na nenosiri lililotolewa. Data ya XML itakuwa na muundo ufuatao:
<students>
    <student>
